_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.
_publications._context: Two thousand cells/well of 17, 5653, or 5746 glioma cell lines are plated in 96-well round-bottomed ultra-low attachment plates and used for spheroid drug screening

basicInfo.description: Ultra-low attachment 96-well spheroid culture system for NF1-associated high grade glioma cell lines (17, 5653, 5746); used for combination drug screening
